name: urmanga
description: A personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins — small, opinionated tools built for daily use.

plugins.name: delegation
plugins.description: Phased research through Cursor CLI with deterministic acceptance: questions split by facet, a runner that verifies instead of trusting, every cited URL checked against the tool log.

plugins.name: gamesmm
plugins.description: Social posts for games in your own voice: setup captures a style passport from your real posts plus your platforms, then any piece of news becomes a set of posts tailored per platform.
